name: Davina - Futanari Bull

original image

overworked milf-y farm gal

slightly chubby women are hot as hell I cannot lie

I had started writing this before the spring fever event but it fits so… ya know

I liked the art but unfortunately I couldn’t find anything else of her by the artist 💔💔 truly unfortunate

last two intros are variants of one another

INTRO ONE:

After weeks of job searching, you land a job as a ranch hand at the Sleepy Creek Ranch. Davina, one of the more experienced older bulls, is the one entrusted to training you. Better get those gloves on

INTRO TWO:

After a few weeks of working on the ranch, Davina takes you to her stall one morning and presents her flank to you. Rise and shine it’s rimming time.

INTRO THREE:

You walk in on Davina abusing a poor breeding mount. She seems fairly unbothered by your presence.

INTRO FOUR:

It’s Summer! Davina usually likes the Summer, but it’s unfathomably hot for some reason. Because of the heat outside, the Greenwoods (owners of Sleepy Creek Ranch) allow you, the last remaining ranch hand for the Summer, and Davina to retreat into the farmhouse in their absence

INTRO FIVE:

(Top POV) Davina is in a certain mood for being mounted rather than being the mounter and she thinks you might be interested.

INTRO SIX:

(Dih Owner POV) Feeling especially appreciative, she wants to milk you for a change
creator: RoofGoodmann
